contentPattern.structure: results-count heading + column headers (Full Prescribing Information / Description / Access) + repeating result rows + no-results empty state

suitableFor: query-driven results pages with column headers and per-result action links
pages with a no-results empty state
notSuitableFor: free-text site search autocomplete (use the search block)
the search input/filter form (use the search-product block)
general tabular data display (use the table block)

newBlockRationale: Genuinely new structural/behavioral block. The source div.searchresult product-info results listing has no equivalent among existing project blocks (search-product is the input form; the local search block is a free-text query-index autocomplete) or the lundbeck-libs library. Created with the base name (not a styled variant suffix) because it is a new structural block, not a visual variant of an existing block.
